Document merge/insert rules: Import the static class instead: 'using static Aspose.Words.Hyphenation;' or call its members with the fully‑qualified name.
If you need to register a dictionary, call RegisterDictionary directly after the static import or use Aspose.Words.Hyphenation.RegisterDictionary.
Add `using static Aspose.Words.Hyphenation;` to import static members (RegisterDictionary, Callback, IsDictionaryRegistered, WarningCallback).
Update references to Hyphenation members to use the static import (e.g., `WarningCallback = warningInfo;`).
